channel.title: Free First Thursday at Seattle Area Museums
channel.description: Upcoming events for Free First Thursday at Seattle Area Museums

item.title: Free First Thursday at Seattle Area Museums
item.description:
Thursday, April 2, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Various Seattle museums

Free admission at participating Seattle area museums on the first Thursday of every month. Includes SAM (10am–8pm), Seattle Asian Art Museum (10am–5pm), Burke Museum (10am–8pm), Museum of Flight (5–9pm), MOHAI (5–8pm), National Nordic Museum (10am–8pm), and Holocaust Center for Humanity (4–7pm).

Event details
